argument.script: async (intermediate) => { const username = ('{{ username }}' || '').replace(/^@/, ''); const limit = {{ limit }} || 10; await new Promise(r => { const start = Date.now(); const poll = () => { const primary = document.querySelector('[data-testid="primaryColumn"]'); if (primary) return r(); if (Date.now() - start > 10000) return r(); setTimeout(poll, 500); }; poll(); }); await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 3000)); const scrolls = Math.ceil(limit / 5); for (let i = 0; i < scrolls; i++) { window.scrollBy(0, window.innerHeight); await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 2000)); } const results = []; const seen = new Set(); const allImages = document.querySelectorAll('img'); for (const img of allImages) { if (results.length >= limit) break; const src = img.src || img.getAttribute('src') || ''; if (src.includes('pbs.twimg.com/media') || src.includes('pbs.twimg.com/ext_tw_video_image') || src.includes('pbs.twimg.com/amplify_video_thumb')) { let url = src.replace(/&name=\w+/, '&name=large'); if (!url.includes('&name=')) url += '&name=large'; if (!seen.has(url)) { seen.add(url); results.push({ index: results.length + 1, type: 'image', url, size: '' }); } } } const videos = document.querySelectorAll('video[src], video source[src]'); for (const vid of videos) { if (results.length >= limit) break; const src = vid.src || vid.getAttribute('src') || ''; if (!src || seen.has(src)) continue; seen.add(src); results.push({ index: results.length + 1, type: 'video', url: src, size: '' }); } const players = document.querySelectorAll('[data-testid="videoPlayer"]'); for (const player of players) { if (results.length >= limit) break; const tweetLink = player.closest('article')?.querySelector('a[href*="/status/"]'); const href = tweetLink?.getAttribute('href') || ''; if (!href || seen.has(href)) continue; seen.add(href); results.push({ index: results.length + 1, type: 'video-tweet', url: 'https://x.com' + href, size: '' }); } return { results }; }
async (intermediate) => { if (intermediate.error) return [{ index: 0, type: '', url: '', size: '', error: intermediate.error }]; return intermediate.results || []; }

description: Download media from a Twitter/X user
name: Download
